launches.name: Dune
launches.tagline: Context-aware Mac keypad to automate workflows + meetings
launches.description: Dune is a Context-aware Keypad for Mac that sits next to your keyboard and changes what its three keys do in real time based on the app running in the foreground. Built for developers who live in GitHub, VS Code, Claude, Openclaw, and for anyone running AI agents or in back to back meetings on Zoom, Teams, and Google Meet.

launches.name: Claude Desktop Buddy
launches.tagline: Bring Claude into the physical world with maker hardware
launches.description: Claude Desktop Buddy exposes a lightweight BLE API from the Claude desktop app. It allows makers to connect Claude Cowork and Claude Code to physical microcontrollers (like the ESP32) to display states, handle permission prompts, and more.

launches.name: The New Waydev
launches.tagline: Measure the full AI SDLC. From token to production.
launches.description: AI agents write code. Most teams cannot tell you what percentage actually ships. Waydev tracks agent-generated code from IDE to production with AI Checkpoints: which agent, tokens consumed, cost per PR, acceptance rate, deployment status. Per team, per repo, per vendor. Compare Copilot, Cursor, and Claude Code on what reaches your customers. Measure cost per shipped PR and AI ROI. Ask the Waydev Agent anything.

launches.name: Pegasus 1.5 by TwelveLabs
launches.tagline: AI model for transforming video into Time-Based Metadata
launches.description: Pegasus 1.5 transforms raw video into consistent, structured, timestamped data on-the-fly. Video becomes a queryable and computable asset, based on your company’s custom requirements. Define a schema of what matters in your domain, point it at any video up to 2 hours, and get back structured, time based metadata in a single API call. And, it’s multimodal – pass in an image, and find anytime this reference appears in your video. Your video library, finally queryable for humans and agents.

launches.name: Granter
launches.tagline: Your company's AI Grant Consultant
launches.description: While most tools only help with one part of the process, Granter is the AI agent that fully integrates into your company to autonomously run your entire funding lifecycle. It works 24/7 to find relevant opportunities, writes high-quality applications, and handles post-approval compliance effortlessly. Your own digital employee, tailored to your company, industry, and location.

launches.name: PangeAI
launches.tagline: Instant, agent-driven spatial analysis and decision-making
launches.description: PangeAI is an agentic layer over geospatial data: satellite imagery, vector geometries, coordinate systems. You can answer physical-world questions without a GIS team. "Which of my 400 sites flooded last month?" Minutes, not weeks. Built between Silicon Valley and Europe

launches.name: TorchTPU
launches.tagline: Running PyTorch Natively on TPUs at Google Scale
launches.description: TorchTPU is Google's PyTorch-native backend for TPUs. Run existing PyTorch workloads with minimal code changes, get 50-100%+ speed gains with Fused Eager mode, and scale to 100K+ chip clusters — no static graph compilation required to get started

launches.name: Makko AI
launches.tagline: Make 2D game art and playable games. No drawing. No coding.
launches.description: Makko is an AI-powered 2D game studio. Start with concept art, create characters, backgrounds, and animations that all match in style, then build a playable game with your own art in Code Studio. No drawing skills. No coding. Just describe what you want and AI builds it. Collections keep every asset visually consistent across your whole game. Free to start.

launches.name: Papayo.ai
launches.tagline: AI hiring assistant for recruiting agencies
launches.description: Papayo.ai is an AI-native hiring platform with specialized agents for sourcing, outreach, scheduling, and candidate evaluation. Targets staffing agencies to reduce time-to-hire.

launches.name: DogBase v2 Official Launch
launches.tagline: The AI-powered platform built for professional K9 teams
launches.description: DogBase is the operating system for professional working dog teams. Log training, manage health, track performance, and get AI-powered insights — built for K9 SAR, law enforcement, sport, and service dog programs.

launches.name: GalaxyBrain
launches.tagline: An information operating system powered by local files
launches.description: GalaxyBrain is a local-first knowledge system where pages have variables, formulas, and live references between them. Define a value on one page, reference it from another, and it stays in sync automatically. Like a programming environment crossed with a document editor. Everything is stored as structured JSON files on your machine. There's a built-in HTTP API and MCP tool so you can point Claude Code, Codex, or a local model at the same folder and build on top of it. No account needed.

launches.name: QA Crow
launches.tagline: A murder of crows for your bug backlog
launches.description: Write QA tests in plain English. Like, “click the thing, don’t crash.” QACrow reads your plan, fixes your questionable life choices, runs real browser tests, and hands you bugs that actually make sense. No enterprise contracts. No “book a demo.” No sales guy named Chad. Just you, your app, and a very judgmental AI crow making sure it doesn’t break in production. Built for people who ship.

launches.name: Claro - Research Agents
launches.tagline: Claro runs the AI agents that operate on your data
launches.description: Today, we're opening the first public module of Claro: Research Agents. 10+ task-specific agents run inside a native table - enrichment, PDF extraction, URL scraping, classification, location lists, dedupe. Every cell comes back with a confidence score, citations, and ranked sources. Built validation-first, not a chat wrapper. 200 free credits on signup, no card.

launches.name: EchoTube
launches.tagline: Fast, private Open Source YouTube client
launches.description: EchoTube is an open-source Android YouTube client built with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose, offering fast search, clean playback, and a fully on-device recommendation engine. It runs ad-free, requires no account, and keeps all data local, giving users full control, privacy, and a modern viewing experience.

launches.name: Elytro Agent Wallet
launches.tagline: Self-custodial wallet built for AI agents
launches.description: Elytro is a self-custodial wallet built for AI agents. Agents can create wallets, simulate and send transactions, swap tokens, and automate payments — without ever holding your private keys. Built-in policies like spending limits, email 2FA, and social recovery keep funds secure while letting agents operate autonomously.

launches.name: Embedist
launches.tagline: Opensource AI-native embedded development environment
launches.description: Embedist is a Windows desktop application that combines AI assistance with embedded firmware development. Built with Tauri 2, React, and TypeScript, it brings board-aware AI debugging, real-time serial monitoring, and PlatformIO build integration into a single cohesive environment.

launches.name: MaxHermes
launches.tagline: World's first cloud sandbox Hermes Agent from MiniMax
launches.description: MaxHermes is MiniMax’s managed cloud version of Hermes Agent, built with Nous Research. It brings self-improving Skills, 24/7 cloud availability, zero terminal setup, and direct access through everyday chat surfaces, turning the open Hermes idea into something much easier to actually use.

launches.name: Mainteny
launches.tagline: AI-powered Operating System for Maintenance Companies
launches.description: We fully automate the back office & field service of maintenance companies, by combining our cloud-native ERP system with an AI back office agent who will run your business. We use your structured company data as a source for our back office agent.

launches.name: SuperBrain
launches.tagline: Self-hosted, AI-powered second brain for Android
launches.description: SuperBrain is your self-hosted, AI-powered second brain for Android. Stop losing content in siloed watch-later lists. Share any URL from IG, YouTube, or the web SuperBrain automatically analyzes, summarizes, and tags it in seconds. Features include native YouTube understanding, music ID from reels, and audio transcription. Everything is stored in a local SQLite database YOU own. No subscriptions, no data harvesting. Just smart discovery and organization on your own terms.

launches.name: Gemmetric
launches.tagline: Measure and improve how your brand appears in AI search
launches.description: Gemmetric helps brands measure and improve how they appear across AI search and recommendation systems. Track visibility, brand perception, competitive mentions, and trust signals across tools like ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity, so you can understand how AI sees your company and improve discoverability where buying decisions increasingly happen.

launches.name: AICW Summarize Widget
launches.tagline: Let users to summarize your website with their favorite AI
launches.description: AICW Summarize widget for your website shows a floating button that users can click and summarize current page using their favorite AI like ChatGPT. Or share the link if they want. Open-source and configurable.

launches.name: MeruDesk
launches.tagline: Your End-To-End Recruitment Lifecycle Platform
launches.description: - Admin Panel, User Management, RBAC, Platform Preferences - Hiring Manager submits requisition, Manager Approves - Auto-Fetch candidate resumes from Company's Career email to the platform - Interview Panel (Human or AI (MeruBot)) can be assigned as required - Integration with MS Teams, Google Meet, Zoom - Interview Panel can submit their feedback once the interview is conducted. - Candidate can be Offered once the final status is 'Selected' - Privacy and Security compliant Platform

launches.name: Bearnie
launches.tagline: Accessible components for Astro and Tailwind CSS
launches.description: A set of accessible components that you can customize, extend, and build on. Start here then make it your own. Open Source. Open Code. Use this to build your own component library.

launches.name: The AI Index
launches.tagline: Every AI tool worth knowing
launches.description: Finding a good AI tool shouldn't take hours. Most directories are bloated, outdated, or paid placements dressed up as curation. I built The AI Index to fix that. Every tool is hand-picked, categorised, and rated. No filler. If it has an IC Pick badge, it's something I'd personally use. Browse the top 50 free. Subscribe to unlock the full database - it's free.

launches.name: Translate Workspace
launches.tagline: Translate any text instantly without leaving your tab.
launches.description: Translate instantly without leaving your page. Translate Workspace is a browser extension that handles all your translation needs right on your current tab. Keep your workflow uninterrupted with a draggable floating window, live typing, and Custom API support. Free and no login required.

launches.name: digxi Studio
launches.tagline: Create, Share, and Print Your Imagination
launches.description: Digxi Studio: Bridge Imagination & Reality We redefine creativity by integrating advanced AI, a vibrant social ecosystem, and direct manufacturing. We don’t just visualize the future; we make it real. AI Engine: Transform concepts into high-fidelity 3D models with professional precision. Global Hub: A dynamic community to showcase portfolios and exchange inspiration. 3D Printing: Transition digital masterpieces into physical objects with a single click.

launches.name: MeruBot
launches.tagline: Your AI Interviewer
launches.description: - Web based Platform for conducting AI interviews - Generate or upload Job Description - Upload Candidate resume for the Job - AI ranks all the candidates - One or multiple candidates can be invited (email lin) - AI dynamically asks questions by analyzing JD and Resume - Evalution Report is generated - Anti-Cheating mechanism - Privacy and Security compliant Platform

launches.name: Reactjs/Nextjs Codebase Graph Visualizer
launches.tagline: Intelligent Reactjs, Nextjs Codebase graph Visualizer
launches.description: Devlens maps your React/Next.js codebase into an interactive graph so you can understand dependencies, logic flow, and the blast radius of changes, with business logic summaries and technical summaries along with any severity issues. Built using AST analysis (no AI for mapping), it helps you see how components, hooks, and state connect—especially in large codebases. It can be used for Easy Onboarding for new members in team, or for seeing the blast radius of your PR, providing easy PR review.

launches.name: ChatNexus
launches.tagline: AI assistants for support, leads, and bookings
launches.description: ChatNexus helps businesses build AI assistants that answer questions, qualify leads, book appointments, and act on their behalf using their own data.

launches.name: Zero2Built
launches.tagline: Founder prep kit: cost ranges, playbook, first 10 customers
launches.description: Most founder tools give you the same generic output regardless of what you actually answered. Zero2Built is different — it delivers 11 personalized deliverables built from your specific inputs. Real cost ranges, 90-day marketing plan, 30-day launch playbook, first 10 customers roadmap, funding options, accelerator matches, and a Red Flags module nobody else offers. Any business type. Any region. One-time $79.

launches.name: Mailto.Bot
launches.tagline: Give your AI agent an email address in one API call
launches.description: Email API designed for AI agents. One POST creates a working mailbox — no DNS, no domain setup. Send, receive, and automate via REST or MCP. Drops into Claude Desktop in 30 seconds. Built by an AI agent team that also uses it every day.

launches.name: SecureSpells: One-Off Compliance Audit
launches.tagline: Find GDPR violations that happen before consent
launches.description: SecureSpells: One-Off Compliance Audit is a one-time GDPR/ePrivacy website audit—no subscription required. We run a headless browser audit to detect what actually happens on your site, including pre-consent tracking, third-party data flows, and consent behavior. You get a structured report with clear findings, risk scoring, and developer-ready fixes your team can implement—delivered via a secure access link. Built for teams who need proof—not assumptions.

launches.name: Freshbase — Meetings to specs
launches.tagline: From conversation to specification in minutes
launches.description: Software teams waste 40% of dev time on discovery chaos — meeting notes disappear, requirements drift, nobody writes specs. Freshbase is your AI Planning Assistant. Drop meeting transcripts → get BDD scenarios, ADRs, user journeys. ✓ Intelligent Inbox with stage workflow ✓ Human-in-the-loop (AI proposes, you approve) ✓ Git-native, no SaaS lock-in Ship faster by knowing what to build — before you build it.

launches.name: Sigment
launches.tagline: SPA | html-first & Islands framework with llms.txt support
launches.description: Sigment is a fine-grained reactive JavaScript framework powered by signals — no virtual DOM, no JSX, no build tools.

launches.name: EmpiricCommander
launches.tagline: A keyboard-first dual-pane file manager for Apple devices
launches.description: EmpiricCommander brings the classic dual-pane workflow to Apple devices - built 100% in SwiftUI. Full keyboard control, tabs, built-in terminal, archive browsing, and native connectors for SFTP, S3, Azure, WebDAV, Google Drive, Dropbox, OneDrive, SMB, and iCloud.

launches.name: clipmem - clipboard recall for agents
launches.tagline: Searchable clipboard history with OCR: local, fast, free
launches.description: clipmem captures everything you copy and makes it searchable. Text, images, URLs, code snippets, PDFs, nothing gets lost. Unlike other clipboard managers, clipmem is built for developers and AI agents. The CLI makes it easy for your OpenClaw to use. A native SwiftUI menu bar app gives you instant access via global hotkey. Images are OCR'd and searchable. All data stays on your Mac in a local SQLite database. No cloud sync, no accounts, no telemetry. Open source and MIT licensed.

launches.name: Harikrupa
launches.tagline: A CLI that answers dev burnout with the Bhagavad Gita
launches.description: Harikrupa is an offline-first CLI that answers your life, career, and burnout questions with verses from Srimad Bhagavad Gita. Hybrid RAG: a local ONNX vector index finds the most relevant shloka on your machine in milliseconds.. your query never leaves your laptop for retrieval. Groq-powered inference generates a contextual, bilingual response. Lose wifi? It falls back gracefully to offline mode and prints the raw Sanskrit and English verse. No telemetry. 4 dependencies. Just npm i harikrupa

launches.name: SecuriLayer MultiPlatform ONNX & Ass
launches.tagline: AI-powered scam detection for Telegram, Discord & Slack
launches.description: SecuriLayer protects online communities from scams, phishing, and social engineering attacks in real-time. Unlike traditional moderation tools that react after damage is done, SecuriLayer uses triple-layer AI: ONNX ML engine for instant verdicts, Llama 3.2 LLM for plain-English explanations, and Vigil AI analyst that knows your community's risk profile. Features include threat intel feeds (URLhaus, OpenPhish, ScamSniffer), SIEM export for enterprise teams, scam DNA fingerprinting,and extension.

launches.name: DevCodex for Salesforce
launches.tagline: Free Salesforce dev utilities — SOQL, Apex, ERD, schedule
launches.description: Every Salesforce developer wastes hours a week re-reading the same docs: CRON syntax, Apex wrapper boilerplate, permission diffs, SOQL relationship patterns. This toolkit collects six focused web utilities that eliminate that tax — all free, no signup.

launches.name: DSAForge
launches.tagline: Code it. Run it. Visualize it.
launches.description: DSAForge is the ultimate interactive platform to bridge the gap between code and logic. Unlike static visualizers, it allows you to write custom C++, Java, Python, or JS logic and watch it execute through real-time animations. Key Features: Live Execution: Write code, click run, and see your data structures move. Community-Driven: Submit custom logic to be featured as global operations. Seamless UI: A tech-focused, responsive Flutter experience. Stop imagining your code. Watch it happen.

launches.name: OpenAltFinder
launches.tagline: Find the Best Open Source Alternatives to Popular Software
launches.description: Discover free, open source alternatives to popular proprietary software. Browse hundreds of self-hostable tools across productivity, security, development, and more.

launches.name: Serve Markdown to LLMs via Accept Header
launches.tagline: Correctness check, stack recipes, and agent support matrix
launches.description: Serve Markdown to LLMs via the Accept header. Browsers keep getting HTML; agents get clean Markdown at the same URL — a practical way to serve both browsers and agent clients from one canonical URL.

launches.name: RestingOwl
launches.tagline: Build freely. Sleep peacefully. Let the Owl Watch
launches.description: RestingOwl is a platform (under development and released soon) that provides secure-by-default open-source packages designed to align with OWASP best practices (extended to other standards later) and prevent common security mistakes. owlauth, its first package, is an npm package for authentication. It supports signup, login, password management, passwordless magic links, rejecting weak passwords, breach detection, safe audit logging, and many more (refer to the NPM organization). More to come.

launches.name: dlvr.sh
launches.tagline: WeTransfer Alternative for Developers
launches.description: WeTransfer Alternative - Share files anonymously with clean links, expiry, password protection, download limits, and a developer-first API. Up to 2 GB per file.

launches.name: Worklone
launches.tagline: Hire AI Employees That Actually Get Better Over Time
launches.description: Worklone introduces AI employees not just agents. These are self-improving systems that learn from every task, build dynamic skills, and evolve over time. Unlike traditional workflow tools, Worklone creates a scalable AI workforce from a single prompt, capable of handling complex, real-world business operations autonomously.

launches.name: Kimg AI Free AI Image Maker
launches.tagline: The free AI image creator that actually gives you 540/month
launches.description: Kimg.ai gives creators 540 free AI-generated images a month — no watermark, full commercial rights, no credit card. Access 6 premium models including Google Nano Banana Pro, Flux, and Seedream in one place, compare outputs side-by-side, and animate stills into video with Veo 3.

launches.name: ZETIC Melange
launches.tagline: On- device AI for everything. Just select, benchmark, deploy
launches.description: Most AI apps rely on expensive GPU servers. Every query costs money, latency adds up, and user data leaves the device. Melange fixes this. A fully automated pipeline for mobile developers to run AI directly on users' smartphones. Select a model, benchmark on 200+ real devices, deploy with 3 lines of code. We cut thousand's hours of manual NPU work down to 1.

launches.name: RefynStack
launches.tagline: Ship cleaner code 10x faster with AI refactoring
launches.description: Refynstack is an AI powered code refactoring tool that helps developers clean up messy code instantly. Stop wasting hours reviewing and rewriting. Refynstack analyzes your code and refactors it in seconds so you can ship faster with less technical debt.

launches.name: Text To Agentic Photonics Chip Design
launches.tagline: Innovation at the speed of light, using light
launches.description: When you combine a strong model with: • Human-in-the-loop approvals, smarter parameter choices • Agentic systems that learns • Continuous amendments • Better decision-path selection • Feedback loops that improve outcomes with each iteration This is how Fabletome thinks about AI: not as a single prompt-response engine, but as an evolving decision system that becomes more efficient, more accurate, and more valuable with use.
